description: Constrained path-aware threshold selection using step-14 spatial diagnostics without rerunning neural inference.

constrained_strategies.name: constrained_safety_tie
constrained_strategies.description: Use only validation safety-optimal thresholds, then spatial risk as tie-breaker.

constrained_strategies.name: constrained_safety_2pp
constrained_strategies.description: Allow validation safety utility to fall by at most 0.02 while minimizing spatial risk.

constrained_strategies.name: constrained_safety_5pp
constrained_strategies.description: Allow validation safety utility to fall by at most 0.05 while minimizing spatial risk.
